observations: Deployment followed proper sequence: tests → build → push → deploy → verify
Fixed stale test assertion (image_provider default changed to 'gemini')
Deployment verified with railway deployment list showing SUCCESS status
Updated test_session_config_defaults to match current defaults
All 121 backend tests + 32 frontend tests passed before deploy

nonBlockingObservations.description: Worker suggested a deploy-specific skill would be more appropriate than fullstack-worker for deployment tasks — reasonable feedback.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Deploy features would benefit from a separate skill rather than fullstack-worker, which includes TDD and manual verification steps that don't apply to deployments.
